name: obsidian-bridge
description: Install with a guided wizard, then safely read, create, and append within GUI-scoped local Obsidian vaults.

interface.shortDescription: Guided setup for safe Obsidian access
interface.longDescription: Run the bundled Windows installer once, then choose protected folder access or explicitly authorize full-vault autonomous create and append from Bridge Control. Separate MCP writers preserve prompt approval for protected vaults and automatic execution only for vaults set to full access.
defaultPrompt: Find my Obsidian notes about a project and summarize them with citations.
Show recent Obsidian notes and identify related backlinks.
Use my Bridge Control permissions to find notes or prepare an approved create or append.
